text: ✏️ Prompts

Prompt Management.Choose an option:

[📝 Create new prompt] [📚 Choose Existing] [⬅️ Main Menu]
📝 Create new prompt

Let's create a new prompt.What tone or style do you prefer for your podcast?

[🎙️ Ironic] [🎓 Prof] [😂 Comedian]
🎓 Prof

"Prof" style (Academic and Formal) set.What length do you prefer for the podcast?

[⚡ FAST (2-3 min)] [⏱️ MEDIUM (5-7 min)] [🕰️ LONG (10+ min)]
⚡ FAST

You have chosen FAST.Do you want to provide specific topics or do we proceed with the generation right away?

[🚀 Generate Now] [➕ Add Topic]
🚀 Generate Now
Received!I begin podcast creation using the new "Prof" prompt.
Analysis of the academic and formal tone required...
Drafting of the formal and informative dialogue between the presenters...
Advanced vocabulary review and script formatting...
Academic script successfully generated.
Great, the formal text is ready.Now let's proceed with the audio via NotebookLM.
Preparing the text-to-speech environment...
Generation of the voice of the Prof. Host (main speaker)...
Co-Host voice generation and synchronization...
Final audio mastering completed!
